targetTranslation: we sent it down (object of إِنَّا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

ayahArabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبٰرَكَةٍ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

ayahArabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

ayahArabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

targetTranslation: a matter (object of يُفْرَقُ - is decided/distinguished)
ayahArabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

ayahArabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

ayahArabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

ayahArabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

ayahArabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

ayahArabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

ayahArabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,

ayahArabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,

targetTranslation: he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,

ayahArabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ and ٱلْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

ayahArabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

targetTranslation: those who are completely sure (acted on by إِن)
ayahArabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

ayahArabic: لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

targetTranslation: he gives life to (paired with وَيُمِيتُ - and he causes death)
ayahArabic: لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

ayahArabic: لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

ayahArabic: لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahEnglish: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

ayahArabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

ayahArabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

ayahArabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

ayahArabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

ayahArabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ هٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

ayahArabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ هٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

ayahArabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ هٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

targetTranslation: O our Lord! (calling out to اكْشِفْ)
ayahArabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

ayahArabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

ayahArabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

targetTranslation: How can it be? From where? (expressing disbelief about الذِّكْرَىٰ)
ayahArabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

targetTranslation: he came to them (object of came)
ayahArabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

ayahArabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

targetTranslation: clearly evident, very clear (describing رَسُولٌ - a messenger)
ayahArabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

targetTranslation: they turned away (from عَنْهُ - from him)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

targetTranslation: one who is taught (object of قَالُوا - they said)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayahEnglish: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

targetTranslation: we are the removers (subject of إِنَّا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

targetTranslation: for a little while (object of كَاشِفُوا/removing)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

ayahArabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

targetTranslation: on the day (object of نَبْطِشُ - we seize)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

targetTranslation: we seize/attack violently (happening in يَوْمَ - on the Day)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

targetTranslation: those who take revenge (subject of إِنَّا)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

targetTranslation: before them (refers to the people mentioned before in the ayah)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

targetTranslation: people, folk (as the object being tested)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

ayahArabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

ayahArabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

ayahArabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

ayahArabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

ayahArabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahEnglish: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

targetTranslation: I (will) bring to you all (addressing the disbelievers)
ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

ayahArabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

targetTranslation: I sought refuge (from تَرْجُمُونِ - you stoning me)
ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

ayahArabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

ayahArabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

ayahArabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

ayahArabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

ayahArabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

targetTranslation: at night (describes when فَأَسْرِ/travel by night happens)
ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

targetTranslation: ones who are being pursued (by فرعون/Pharaoh)
ayahArabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

targetTranslation: in a state of calmness/stillness (describing how to leave the sea)
ayahArabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

ayahArabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

ayahArabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

targetTranslation: how many/much (asking about جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ - gardens and springs)
ayahArabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahEnglish: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

ayahArabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahEnglish: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

ayahArabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahEnglish: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

ayahArabic: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: And crops and noble sites

ayahArabic: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فٰكِهِينَ
ayahEnglish: And comfort wherein they were amused.

targetTranslation: ones who are enjoying/happy (in accusative case)
ayahArabic: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فٰكِهِينَ
ayahEnglish: And comfort wherein they were amused.

targetTranslation: a people (object of أَوْرَثْنٰهَا - we made inherit it)
ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

targetTranslation: others (being acted upon by أَوْرَثْنٰهَا - we gave it as inheritance)
ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

targetTranslation: she wept (subject of heaven and earth)
ayahArabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

ayahArabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

targetTranslation: those who are given time (object of كانوا)
ayahArabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

ayahArabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

ayahArabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

ayahArabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

targetTranslation: with knowledge (relating to اخْتَرْنٰهُمْ/We chose them)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

targetTranslation: what/that which (connects to فِيهِ - in it)
ayahArabic: وَءَاتَيْنٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

ayahArabic: وَءَاتَيْنٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

ayahArabic: وَءَاتَيْنٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْءَايٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

ayahArabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

ayahArabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

ayahArabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

targetTranslation: Are they? (asking about the people mentioned before)
ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

targetTranslation: people (subject of أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ - are they better)
ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

targetTranslation: of a Tubba (Yemeni king) (part of قَوْمُ - people of)
ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ أَهْلَكْنٰهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لٰعِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

targetTranslation: between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لٰعِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

targetTranslation: players/those who act without purpose (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)
ayahArabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لٰعِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

ayahArabic: مَا خَلَقْنٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

targetTranslation: most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
ayahArabic: مَا خَلَقْنٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: مَا خَلَقْنٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

targetTranslation: their appointed time (subject of يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

targetTranslation: all together (describing the group in يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

targetTranslation: he makes (someone) without need (subject: يَوْمَ - Day)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

targetTranslation: any protector/helper at all (doer of يُغْنِى)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: he was merciful (subject of إِلَّا مَن)
ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: Allah (subject of رَّحِمَ - the one who had mercy)
ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
distractors: and would be conscious of it

ayahArabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the tree of zaqqūm

ayahArabic: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Is food for the sinful.

targetTranslation: it boils violently (like كَٱلْمُهْلِ - like molten metal)
ayahArabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
ayahEnglish: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

ayahArabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

targetTranslation: to the middle, to the center (of الْجَحِيمِ - the Hellfire)
ayahArabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

targetTranslation: taste! (command to one person, said mockingly to the arrogant person in Hell)
ayahArabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
ayahEnglish: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

targetTranslation: you (speaking to one male, subject of ٱلْعَزِيزُ)
ayahArabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
ayahEnglish: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

targetTranslation: that which (refers to what is being doubted in كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

targetTranslation: you all were (referring to what you used to doubt)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

targetTranslation: a place of standing (location in أَمِينٍ secure)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:

ayahArabic: فِى جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahEnglish: Within gardens and springs,

targetTranslation: they put on (clothing) (subject of مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ - facing each other)
ayahArabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

ayahArabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

targetTranslation: those facing each other (describes the people wearing garments)
ayahArabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقٰبِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

ayahArabic: كَذٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

ayahArabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

targetTranslation: any fruit (in a series of blessings)
ayahArabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

targetTranslation: ones who are safe (describing the believers in Paradise)
ayahArabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

targetTranslation: they taste/experience (referring to the people of Paradise)
ayahArabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

targetTranslation: punishment (object of وَقَىٰهُمْ - protected them from)
ayahArabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

targetTranslation: as a favor (from رَّبِّكَ - your Lord)
ayahArabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

ayahArabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

targetTranslation: that, that one (pointing to something far)
ayahArabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

ayahArabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ذٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahEnglish: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

targetTranslation: We made it easy (referring to the Quran)
ayahArabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.

targetTranslation: they reflect deeply (on لَعَلَّهُمْ 'so that they')
ayahArabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.

targetTranslation: ones who are waiting and watching (subject of فَٱرْتَقِبْ)
ayahArabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So watch, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
